archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) for parent trust
brand_voice: Friendly, nurturing, playful but trustworthy, premium, safe.

typography.instruction: Use Fredoka for headings to convey softness and playfulness. Use Nunito for body text for supreme legibility and a friendly, rounded aesthetic. Never use generic sans like Inter. Ensure text contrast against soft backgrounds.

colors.instruction: Avoid pure white for main backgrounds; use amber-50 to feel warm and organic. Use vibrant but pastel-leaning colors (orange, sky, mint, amber) to create a joyful, premium feel without looking cheap. Text should be deep slate, not pure black.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white rounded-[2rem] border-2 border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
surface_styles.instruction: Apply the 'Tactile Neumorphism' variant: mix soft shadows with crisp 2px borders (border-slate-100) to ensure shapes feel physical like toys or building blocks. Navigation should use the 'Crystal Glass' effect.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons scale up slightly (scale-105). Cards lift (-translate-y-2) and gain deeper shadows.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for gentle entrance stagger on grids (Why Us, Programs). Add continuous slow float animation (y: [-10, 10, -10]) to decorative background blobs or shapes.

icons.style: Use strokeWidth={2.5} for a chunkier, friendlier look. Enclose icons in soft colored circles (e.g., bg-orange-100 text-orange-500 p-3 rounded-full).

page_sections_instructions.navigation: Sticky Crystal Glass header (z-50). Logo: Lucide 'Sparkles' or 'BookOpen' + text 'Little Gurus'. Desktop: links + secondary CTA + primary CTA ('Enroll Now'). Mobile: elegant full-screen overlay menu.
page_sections_instructions.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left: H1, subtext, dual CTAs ('Book a Free Tour' [primary, orange], 'View Programs' [outline]). Right: Large masked image of child learning online with floating decorative shapes (stars, circles).
page_sections_instructions.trust_strip: Horizontal flowing list of trust badges (Certified Teachers, Small Classes, Safe, 10+ Years). Use soft pastel backgrounds for badges.
page_sections_instructions.why_us: Bento grid (Tetris style). Mix large featured cards with smaller stat/icon cards. Emphasize holistic, play-based virtual learning.
page_sections_instructions.programs_preview: Grid of age-based cards. Card content: Age range, Program Name, 3 bullet points, 'Enquire' button. Give each card a distinct accent color theme (e.g., Mint for 2-4, Sky for 5-7, Orange for 8-10).
page_sections_instructions.timeline: Vertical staggered list or horizontal scroll for 'A Day at Little Gurus'. Use icons and soft photos showing virtual circle time, activities, etc.
page_sections_instructions.testimonials: Carousel (Swiper or Framer Motion slider) featuring parent reviews. Highlight peace of mind and child engagement.
page_sections_instructions.admissions_fees: 3-step process cards (Simple linear flow). Fees table should be clean, using the 'Grid Borders' tech look but softened with brand colors.
page_sections_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form/Input but heavily customize: rounded-2xl inputs, thick focus rings (focus:ring-orange-400), floating labels.
page_sections_instructions.footer: Darker background (bg-slate-900) to ground the page. White text. Large friendly CTA ('Let's start learning!'), newsletter signup, and quick links.

hero.description: Young girl using a tablet for online learning, focused with digital pen. Excellent for hero section right side.

about_parents.description: Father bonding with daughter using laptop at home. Highlights parental involvement and trust.

programs.description: Boy sitting using tablet. Good for Preschool online learning program card.
Little girl sitting at a table with a laptop. Good for After-School Tutoring program card.

background_textures.description: Soft fluid background pattern. Use with very low opacity (opacity-10) or mix-blend modes to add texture behind sections.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards. If putting text on Orange, ensure it is white and bold.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements. E.g., `data-testid='hero-book-tour-btn'`, `data-testid='nav-enroll-link'`, `data-testid='program-enquire-btn'`, `data-testid='contact-form-submit'`.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All buttons and links MUST have distinct focus rings: `focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-4 focus-visible:ring-orange-400/50`
